mapper.select:
SELECT sr.id, sr.customer_id, sr.manager_id, sr.create_time, sr.update_time, c.name AS customer_name, u.name AS manager_name FROM service_relation sr LEFT JOIN customer c ON sr.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sr.manager_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE sr.deleted = 0
AND (c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sr.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY sr.create_time DESC
